name: browsemark
description: Browse and annotate your codebase docs in the browser. Annotations flow to AI coding agents via MCP. Zero config.

scripts.build: tsc && rm -rf dist/server/public && cp -R public/. dist/server/public
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run build:frontend && npm test && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint:frontend: cd packages/frontend && npx eslint src/ test/
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run build:frontend && node dist/index.js
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run build:frontend && tsc --watch --preserveWatchOutput & cd packages/frontend && npm run build -- --watch & node dist/index.js
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run lint:frontend && npm run build && npm test && npm run test:frontend

author: ashishmerani
